label: Orders Table
description: Full orders table with integrated filters, sorting, status badges, and inline cancel and amend actions.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget — wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: no any or @ts — ignore; as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[] casts on export data are type — safe narrowings

0.5.note: widget imports only from context, shared, and ui components

0.6.note: isLoading passed to TableWidget which renders skeleton

0.7.note: emptyMessage="No orders match your filters" passed to TableWidget

0.8.note: error={error ? "Failed to load orders" : null} + onRetry={refetch} passed to TableWidget

0.9.note: no commented — out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required.

1.1.note: all data (filteredOrders, filters, actions) exclusively from useOrdersData()

1.2.note: orders — data — context.tsx uses useGlobalScope() and scopeStrategyIds

1.3.note: scopedOrders filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds

1.4.note: getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; cascades through org→client→strategy

1.5.note: local strategyFilter + globalScope.strategyIds both applied in context

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips filter, returns all orders

1.7.note: widget has no inline reference data; ASSET_CLASS_OPTIONS from context is a domain type constant

l1.notes: Context (read-only): imports from lib/mocks/* are dev-mode data sources in the context layer, not in the widget. Acceptable per spec.
